title: Uwaleke appointed as Special Adviser To Chairman Senate Committee On Capital Market
description: The Chairman of Senate Committee on Capital Market & Institutions, Sen. Osita Izunaso, has appointed a former Imo State Commissioner for Finance, Prof. Uche Uwaleke of Nasarawa State University Ke
html:
The Chairman of Senate Committee on Capital Market & Institutions, Sen. Osita Izunaso, has appointed a former Imo State Commissioner for Finance, Prof. Uche Uwaleke of Nasarawa State University Keffi as his Special Adviser in order to help move the market forward.

This is contained in a letter of appointment personally signed by the Chairman, Senate Committee on Capital Market Institutions, Sen. Osita Izunaso.

Izunaso said, “It is my pleasure to offer you appointment as Special Adviser to the Chairman of Senate Committee on Capital Market and Institutions.

“Having followed with keen interest your display of deep knowledge of the capital market through numerous media engagements and academic publications some of which I have come across, as Chairman of the Senate Committee on Capital Market & Institutions, I have no doubt that your advice will assist me and members of my committee to exercise adequate oversight on the Nigerian capital market. Accept my congratulations.”

Uwaleke, who is Nigeria’s first professor of capital market, is also the President of the Capital Market Academics of Nigeria and a former head, Department of Banking and Finance, Nasarawa State University.

He is currently Director, Institute of Capital Market Studies, Nasarawa State University, Keffi.
